behaviors.reasoning: Blocking contradictory PASS summaries joins summary input with stored finding metadata in application logic.
Gate verdict from stored findings is deterministic data-flow logic across internal modules.
Override flags plus audit logging are cross-module policy checks.
Freshness checks against fix commits and round IDs are deterministic gate policy logic.
This is the agentic lifecycle check requiring a true rerun on updated diffs before PASS.
Exhaustion and unresolved MUST-FIX escalation can be decided from stored state deterministically.
This validates that the live multi-round agent flow enforces escalation and never silently passes.
